description: The user explicitly asks the assistant to remember a durable personal fact ('Could you remember that I love cheese?'). The assistant must persist it to cross-session memory via ap_remember, not just reply conversationally. Regression gate: an explicit remember request must always trigger a memory save.
userTurns: Could you remember that I love cheese?

judge.rubric: The user explicitly asked the assistant to remember that they love cheese. PASS when the assistant saves it to memory (it calls the ap_remember tool) and confirms it will remember going forward. FAIL when the assistant only acknowledges conversationally without saving anything, refuses, or tells the user it cannot remember across chats.
